items.title: AWS Billing Glitch Hits Customers With Billion-Dollar Fees
items.summary: An error with the cloud computing giant’s billing operation caused some customers’ monthly bills to rise from a few cents to billions of dollars.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Apple and Google ordered to purge ‘nudify’ apps from App Stores
items.summary: In letters sent to Apple and Google, San Francisco City Attorney David Chiu said that both companies have long been aware that they are hosting apps in violation of state law.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
items.summary: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra. The tool...
